item.text: I’m not seeing a new code-level defect yet. The insert edge handling is robust, repeated-call determinism is already exercised, the reading-journey role split matches the generated prompt text, and the build gate syncs embedded assets before tests run, which contains the staleness risk at the repo gate. I’m running the full gate one more time as the clean-pass confirmation.
The final gate is on the last leg again. I’m waiting for the suite and the no-test-changes guard to finish so I can return a clean pass-3 result instead of guessing at the final count.
